name: EcoFlow GLACIER Classic 45 L compressor refrigerator
basis: Manufacturer reports 190 Wh per 24 h at 25 C ambient and 4 C set point; 300 Wh/day is the hot-vehicle planning allowance

name: 10 L electric boiler
basis: One complete 10 L heat from 15 C to 60 C per day at 87 percent heater/system efficiency; product not yet selected

name: USB-C LED lights
basis: Six 5 W lights used four hours per day; product not yet selected

name: Smartphone charging
basis: Two smartphones at 25 Wh/day each including battery charge-cycle allowance

name: Underfloor heater
basis: 100 W for four hours per day

name: Electric blanket
basis: One 100 W blanket for 15 minutes per day

name: MacBook Air occasional charging
basis: Occasional use represented by 35 Wh/day planning average; existing charger retained

name: Power Hub controls and monitoring overhead
basis: Planning allowance because the published Power Hub manual does not quantify all installed idle losses
